title: fix: tier upgrade defers balance refill to daily cron
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Midnight pollen delivery
gist.blurb: We've synced up our tier upgrades with the daily clock. When you level up, your fresh pollen credits will now arrive right on schedule with the midnight delivery.
gist.summary: Corrected the tier upgrade logic to defer pollen balance refills to the standard daily midnight cron job.
gist.impact: Account upgrades now correctly wait for the daily system-wide refill cycle to grant new pollen allowances, ensuring consistent daily distributions.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the Nomnom creature waiting patiently for a midnight delivery. A glowing retro clock emphasizes the schedule/cron aspect. Night-time cozy vibes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny nightcap, sitting next to a retro digital clock glowing lime green (#ecf874) showing 11:59. The round Nomnom creature waits patiently nearby with an empty bowl. Soft dark lavender and pastel peach night-time gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
